task_completion.description: Open Manufacturing Order MO-00001 for the 4K Laser Projector
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface displays the details page for Manufacturing Order 'MO-00001' with the product '4K Laser Projector'.

task_completion.description: Scrap the damaged Optical Lens Array (LENS-A001)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Scrap order modal or record is visible showing the product 'Optical Lens Array' and the specific Serial Number 'LENS-A001' being scrapped.

task_completion.description: Update the MO to consume the replacement Optical Lens Array (LENS-A002)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The components list or detailed operations tab of the Manufacturing Order shows 'Optical Lens Array' with the replacement Serial Number 'LENS-A002' added or marked as consumed.

task_completion.description: Assign the final product Serial Number PROJ-X99
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lot/Serial Number' field for the final product on the Manufacturing Order form is filled with 'PROJ-X99'.

task_completion.description: Mark the Manufacturing Order as Done
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator/badge for Manufacturing Order 'MO-00001' shows 'Done' (usually located in the top right of the form header).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo UI, clicking buttons, and filling forms.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface is fully rendered with standard menus, tabs, and styling, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected outcomes into a text file or console.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes (like serial numbers and statuses) are reflected within the Odoo form fields and records, not just written as text notes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying Manufacturing Order 'MO-00001' for product '4K Laser Projector'. The agent must scrap component 'Optical Lens Array' with serial 'LENS-A001', consume replacement serial 'LENS-A002', and assign the final product serial 'PROJ-X99'. Verify these exact strings in the Odoo interface.
